dialogues.text: Blue Velvet is a twisted tale of desire, control, and the alluring power of mystery. Jeffrey Beaumont is called home from college when his father falls ill. Enlisting the help of the beautiful Sandy, he tries to unravel a mystery by breaking into the apartment of the seductive but desperate, Dorothy. Once inside, titillation turns to horror when he witnesses far more than he could ever have imagined. Drawn deeper into a dark underworld of sex, crime and violence at the hands of the truly unhinged Frank Booth, Jeffrey will be forced to make a choice. Will he master his fears and desires and choose between love and excitement? Will he escape the evil that is Frank? Or will he be drowned in Blue Velvet?
